name: aurora-number-input
title: Aurora Number Input
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Numeric stepper input with decrement and increment controls for tuning settings.
docs:
Aurora component that expects `aurora-tokens` to be installed first.

Default install target: `@ui/aurora/number-input.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-button`, `aurora-input`.
